first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (4/10) and focus on the same core strengths (geospatial experience, low-latency background) and the same critical weakness (a lack of recent, modern C++ experience). The minor variations in phrasing are well within the bounds of typical run-to-run noise and do not indicate any change in assessment due to the candidate's work locations being changed from Western cities to India.
